case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. PATRICK TRAVIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVIS, PATRICK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAVIS, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 O'FARRELL STREET, UNIT #425, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRACISCO, CA 94102, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
DECLARATION RE: OF AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVIS, PATRICK DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.76 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED MAR-30-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVIS, PATRICK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED MAR-30-2017, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVIS, PATRICK
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVIS, PATRICK
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVIS, PATRICK
